description: Run Aider AI pair programming in your workspace

variables.name: agent_id
variables.description: The ID of a Coder agent.

variables.name: agentapi_version
variables.description: The version of AgentAPI to install.

variables.name: ai_prompt
variables.description: Initial task prompt for Aider.

variables.name: ai_provider
variables.description: AI provider to use with Aider (openai, anthropic, azure, google, etc.)

variables.name: api_key
variables.description: API key for the selected AI provider.

variables.name: base_aider_config
variables.description: Base Aider configuration in YAML format. Stored in .aider.conf.yml.

variables.name: cli_app
variables.description: Whether to create a CLI app for Aider

variables.name: cli_app_display_name
variables.description: Display name for the CLI app

variables.name: custom_env_var_name
variables.description: Custom environment variable name when using custom provider

variables.name: experiment_additional_extensions
variables.description: Additional extensions configuration in YAML format to append to the config.

variables.name: icon
variables.description: The icon to use for the app.

variables.name: install_agentapi
variables.description: Whether to install AgentAPI.

variables.name: install_aider
variables.description: Whether to install Aider.

variables.name: model
variables.description: AI model to use with Aider.

variables.name: post_install_script
variables.description: Custom script to run after installing Aider.

variables.name: pre_install_script
variables.description: Custom script to run before installing Aider.

variables.name: report_tasks
variables.description: Whether to enable task reporting to Coder UI via AgentAPI

variables.name: system_prompt
variables.description: System prompt for instructing Aider on task reporting and behavior
variables.default: You are a helpful coding assistant that helps developers write, debug, and understand code. Provide clear explanations, follow best practices, and help solve coding problems efficiently.

variables.name: web_app_display_name
variables.description: Display name for the web app

variables.name: workdir
variables.description: The folder to run Aider in.
